thi1:1.0.1: p_19Th2_2"Sukhaṁ supāhi therike,Katvā coḷena pārutā;Upasanto hi te rāgo,Sukkhaḍākaṁ va kumbhiyan"ti.
thi1:1.0.2: p_19Th2_4"Mutte muccassu yogehi,cando rāhuggahā iva;Vippamuttena cittena,anaṇā bhuñja piṇḍakan"ti.
thi1:1.0.4: p_19Th2_8"Tisse sikkhassu sikkhāya,mā taṁ yogā upaccaguṁ;Sabbayogavisaṁyuttā,cara loke anāsavā"ti.
thi1:1.0.5: p_19Th2_10"Tisse yuñjassu dhammehi,khaṇo taṁ mā upaccagā;Khaṇātītā hi socanti,nirayamhi samappitā"ti.
thi1:1.0.8: p_19Th2_16"Saddhāya pabbajitvāna,mitte mittaratā bhava;Bhāvehi kusale dhamme,yogakkhemassa pattiyā"ti.
thi1:1.0.9: p_19Th2_18"Saddhāya pabbajitvāna,bhadre bhadraratā bhava;Bhāvehi kusale dhamme,yogakkhemamanuttaran"ti.
thi1:1.0.10: p_19Th2_20"Upasame tare oghaṁ,maccudheyyaṁ suduttaraṁ;Dhārehi antimaṁ dehaṁ,jetvā māraṁ savāhinin"ti.
thi1:1.0.11: p_19Th2_22"Sumuttā sādhumuttāmhi,tīhi khujjehi muttiyā;Udukkhalena musalena,patinā khujjakena ca;Muttāmhi jātimaraṇā,bhavanetti samūhatā"ti.
thi1:1.0.13: p_19Th2_26"Karotha buddhasāsanaṁ,yaṁ katvā nānutappati;Khippaṁ pādāni dhovitvā,ekamante nisīdathā"ti.
thi1:1.0.14: p_19Th2_28"Dhātuyo dukkhato disvā,mā jātiṁ punarāgami;Bhave chandaṁ virājetvā,upasantā carissasī"ti.
thi1:1.0.15: p_19Th2_30"Kāyena saṁvutā āsiṁ,vācāya uda cetasā;Samūlaṁ taṇhamabbuyha,sītibhūtāmhi nibbutā"ti.
thi1:1.0.16: p_19Th2_32"Sukhaṁ tvaṁ vuḍḍhike sehi,katvā coḷena pārutā;Upasanto hi te rāgo,sītibhūtāsi nibbutā"ti.
thi1:1.0.17: p_19Th2_34"Piṇḍapātaṁ caritvāna,daṇḍamolubbha dubbalā;Vedhamānehi gattehi,tattheva nipatiṁ chamā;Disvā ādīnavaṁ kāye,atha cittaṁ vimucci me"ti.
thi1:1.0.18: p_19Th2_36"Hitvā gharepabbajitvā,hitvā puttaṁ pasuṁ piyaṁ;Hitvā rāgañca dosañca,avijjañca virājiya;Samūlaṁ taṇhamabbuyha,upasantāmhi nibbutā"ti.
